engines.label: current
engines.notes: live build. AVX2 + AVX-512 + VNNI kernels. TFRM v7 trace protocol (confidence math fields). Loads .bin format versions 3, 5, 6, 8, 9, 11, 12 (v12 adds MTP byte-0 head + untied lm_head). veritate.exe is whatever build.bat last produced.

engines.label: legacy
engines.notes: frozen v3.4.5 build, renumbered to v1 under the simplified scheme. Kept for A/B regression checks.
